description: Style noteVegas is a city full of daredevils, risk takers and high rollers and this scent from playboy compliments that lifestyle. It's bold and unique, with a striking signature, great for those who like to live life on the edge.Product Details This amazing fragrant sensation is perfect for men and comes in an aerosol spray canisterCautionDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying in eyesSize 200 ml
